The official CBSE marking schemes for Class 12 are available on the board's academic website, **[cbseacademic.nic.in](https://cbseacademic.nic.in)**[1][2].

### How to Access the Marking Scheme
1.  Visit the official website: **[cbseacademic.nic.in](https://cbseacademic.nic.in)**[2].
2.  Look for the **"Curriculum"** or **"Sample Question Paper"** sections in the main menu[3][4].
3.  Select the relevant academic year (e.g., 2025-26 or 2026-27)[3][5].
4.  Navigate to the **"SQP and MS"** (Sample Question Paper and Marking Scheme) link[3][6].
5.  You will see a list of subjects; click on the **"MS"** (Marking Scheme) link next to the subject you need to download the corresponding PDF[4][7][8].

### Key Information
*   **Purpose:** The marking scheme provides suggested value points and guidelines for examiners, helping students understand how answers are evaluated and how marks are distributed[9][10].
*   **Exam Pattern:** For the current academic cycle, the pattern generally includes a mix of 20% MCQs, 30% competency-based questions, and 50% short/long answer questions[5][11].
*   **Passing Criteria:** Students are typically required to secure at least 33% marks in each subject (theory and practical combined) and 33% in the overall aggregate to pass[5][11].

Always ensure you are downloading documents for the correct academic year to align with the latest syllabus and assessment guidelines[5][11].

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to [cbseacademic.nic.in](https://cbseacademic.nic.in/)[2][3].

The URL pattern for accessing Sample Question Papers (SQP) on the official CBSE Academic website (`cbseacademic.nic.in`) typically follows a consistent structure based on the class and the academic session[1][2].

### URL Pattern Structure
The standard URLs for the main SQP pages are constructed as follows:

*   **Class X:** `http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSX_[YEAR].html`[3]
*   **Class XII:** `http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSXII_[YEAR].html`[3]

*(Note: Replace `[YEAR]` with the specific academic session, e.g., `2023-24` or `2024-25`.)*

### Examples for Specific Years
Based on this pattern, the direct URLs for recent sessions are:

**For the 2024-25 Session:**
*   **Class X:** [http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSX_2024-25.html](https://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSX_2024-25.html)
*   **Class XII:** [http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSXII_2024-25.html](https://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSXII_2024-25.html)

**For the 2023-24 Session:**
*   **Class X:** [http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSX_2023-24.html](http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSX_2023-24.html)[3]
*   **Class XII:** [http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSXII_2023-24.html](http://cbseacademic.nic.in/SQP_CLASSXII_2023-24.html)[3]

### How to Access via the Website
If you prefer navigating the site directly:
1.  Visit the official website at [cbseacademic.nic.in](https://cbseacademic.nic.in/)[4][5].
2.  Look for the **"Sample Question Paper"** (or "SQP") menu in the main navigation bar[4][6].
3.  Select the desired academic year (e.g., "SQP 2024-2025") from the dropdown menu[4][6].
4.  Choose your respective class (**Class X** or **Class XII**) to view the list of subjects, their respective Sample Question Papers (SQP), and Marking Schemes (MS)[7][4][6].
